cards.title: Indian Tech Tycoon Bets $30M on AI Office Alternative
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia's venture Neo aims to challenge Microsoft Office and Google Apps with AI-powered enterprise software. This marks Turakhia's fifth venture, focusing on disrupting the productivity software space.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows Investors Prototype AI Handset Device
cards.body: SpaceX demonstrated a handset-like AI device to investors ahead of going public. The prototype signals SpaceX's potential expansion into the wireless market.

cards.title: Ashton Kutcher Launches New VC Firm With Morgan Beller
cards.body: Kutcher is leaving Sound Ventures to start a new fund focused on AI infrastructure and energy. The move targets the foundational layer powering category-leading AI labs.

cards.title: Cloudflare Requires AI Companies to Pay for Content
cards.body: Cloudflare is mandating AI companies separate web crawlers for search from those used for training by September 15. Non-compliance risks blocking by default on many publisher sites.

cards.title: Venice AI Reaches Unicorn Status With $65M Series A
cards.body: Privacy-first Venice AI achieved unicorn valuation and is already profitable with annualized revenues exceeding $70 million. CEO Erik Voorhees highlighted the platform's strong commercial traction.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Agentic Assistant Now on Mac
cards.body: Gemini Spark, Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, expands to Mac with new features including real-time tracking. The update adds support for more apps and improved functionality.

cards.title: Meta Develops AI Compute Cloud Business to Monetize Power
cards.body: Meta is building a cloud infrastructure business to sell AI compute access and models. The move directly competes with AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

cards.title: Trump Administration Drops Restrictions on Anthropic Models
cards.body: The Trump administration lifted restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models, signaling policy shifts. The erratic approach leaves AI companies uncertain about future regulatory guidance.

cards.title: Wayve Launches $85M Tender Offer at $8.5B Valuation
cards.body: Autonomous driving company Wayve is offering employees a tender at $8.5B valuation. The move reflects a growing trend of AI startups using tenders for talent retention.

cards.title: OpenClaw Agentic Program Available on Mobile Platforms
cards.body: The free open-source agentic program OpenClaw launched on Android and iOS. Mobile availability expands access to AI-powered agentic capabilities.

cards.title: Ex-DeepMind Poker AI Trio Valued Over $500M
cards.body: EquiLibre Technologies, founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, surpassed $500M valuation while serving quant hedge funds. The Prague-based lab commercializes advanced AI capabilities for financial applications.

cards.title: Google Releases Faster, Cheaper Image Generator Nano Banana 2 Lite
cards.body: Google's updated Nano Banana 2 Lite image generator offers faster processing and reduced costs. The improvements make AI-generated content creation more accessible to creators.

cards.title: Nvidia Competitor Etched Hits $5B Valuation
cards.body: AI chip startup Etched reached $5B valuation with $1B in contracted sales for its inference systems. The company directly competes with Nvidia in the AI chip market.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Sonnet 5 for Cheaper Agent Deployment
cards.body: Claude Sonnet 5 delivers stronger agentic capabilities at lower pricing than Opus and GPT-5.5. The model emphasizes improved safety alongside cost efficiency for agent applications.

cards.title: Acti Brings AI Agents Into Smartphone Keyboard Interface
cards.body: Acti's new iOS and Android keyboard integrates AI assistants directly into the typing experience. Users can create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language across all apps.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Science Workbench for Researchers
cards.body: Claude Science provides scientists a unified workbench for computational research without tool-switching. The platform consolidates databases, pipelines, and analysis tools in one environment.

cards.title: X Launches MCP Server for AI Developer Integration
cards.body: X released a hosted MCP server enabling easier AI application connections to its API. The move simplifies developer integration with the platform.

cards.title: Riverside Podcasting Platform Enters Newsletter Publishing
cards.body: Riverside now lets users create AI-powered newsletters directly from podcast recordings. The feature expands the platform's content distribution capabilities.

cards.title: Indian Tycoon Builds AI Alternative to Microsoft Office
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia's Neo venture aims to compete with Microsoft Office and Google Apps using AI. It marks his fifth startup and latest enterprise software play.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows Investors AI Handset-Like Device
cards.body: SpaceX revealed a prototype 'handset-like' AI device to investors before going public. The move signals potential expansion into wireless and AI hardware markets.

cards.title: Ashton Kutcher Launches New AI Infrastructure VC Fund
cards.body: Kutcher and Morgan Beller are starting a VC firm focusing on AI infrastructure and energy. The fund targets the foundational layer powering AI labs rather than the labs themselves.

cards.title: Cloudflare Pushes AI Companies to Pay Publishers
cards.body: Cloudflare is requiring AI companies to separate search crawlers from AI training crawlers by September 15. Non-compliance risks being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

cards.title: Venice AI Reaches Unicorn Status on $65M Round
cards.body: Privacy-first AI platform Venice AI achieved unicorn valuation with $65M Series A funding. The company is already profitable with over $70M annualized revenue.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Agentic Assistant Reaches Mac
cards.body: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant Gemini Spark now available on Mac with real-time tracking. The expansion adds support for more apps and improved functionality.

cards.title: Meta Develops Cloud Business Selling AI Compute
cards.body: Meta plans to monetize excess AI compute by building a cloud infrastructure business. The move directly competes with AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

cards.title: Trump Drops Restrictions on Anthropic AI Models
cards.body: Trump administration removed restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models. The erratic approach leaves AI industry with unclear guidance on future releases.

cards.title: Wayve Launches $85M Employee Tender Offer
cards.body: Autonomous driving AI startup Wayve valued at $8.5B in employee tender offering. The move reflects broader trend of AI startups using tenders for talent retention.

cards.title: OpenClaw Agentic Program Launches on Mobile
cards.body: Free open-source agentic program OpenClaw now available on Android and iOS. The expansion brings AI agents directly to smartphone users.

cards.title: Ex-DeepMind Researchers Build $500M Quant AI Lab
cards.body: EquiLibre Technologies, founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, built poker AI now used for hedge funds. The Prague-based lab is valued over $500 million.

cards.title: Google Launches Nano Banana 2 Lite Image Generator
cards.body: Google updated its image generator with faster, cheaper Nano Banana 2 Lite model. The tool aims to help creators generate AI content more efficiently.

cards.title: Nvidia Rival Etched Hits $5B Valuation, $1B Sales
cards.body: Etched, competing with Nvidia on AI chips, booked $1 billion in contracts for inference systems. The company reached $5 billion valuation.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Sonnet 5 for AI Agents
cards.body: Claude Sonnet 5 delivers stronger agentic capabilities with lower pricing than Opus and GPT-5.5. The model improves safety while reducing costs for developers.

cards.title: Acti Puts AI Agents Into Smartphone Keyboards
cards.body: Acti's new iOS and Android keyboard brings AI assistants directly into device keyboards. Users can create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Science Workbench for Researchers
cards.body: Claude Science provides scientists a unified environment for computational research, replacing need for multiple tools. The workbench integrates databases, pipelines, and analysis tools.

cards.title: X Launches MCP Server for AI Tool Integration
cards.body: X's hosted MCP server simplifies AI application connections to the platform's API. The move makes X easier for developers to integrate with AI tools.

cards.title: LLM Groupthink Startup Works to Boost AI Diversity
cards.body: A new startup tackles the tendency of LLMs like Claude and ChatGPT to converge on identical outputs. The company aims to improve randomness and diverse reasoning in AI models.

cards.title: Claude Science Supports Pharmaceutical and Biotech Research
cards.body: Anthropic announced Claude Science, flagship product supporting scientific research similar to Claude Code. The tool enables autonomous scientific computation and analysis.

cards.title: AI Agents Not True Coworkers, Says MIT Analysis
cards.body: MIT examines whether AI agents should be called 'coworkers,' concluding they lack key attributes. The analysis questions enterprise framing of AI tools as teammates.

cards.title: Agriculture Needs Better Data for AI Applications
cards.body: AI offers promising solutions for agriculture but industry data infrastructure remains inadequate. Leaders must invest in data groundwork before deploying AI systems.

cards.title: Global Tech Companies Build R&D Hub in Hidden City
cards.body: Apple, Anthropic, Google, Meta, and others concentrated R&D in single 400,000-person city. The location rivals Silicon Valley as major AI research center.

cards.title: Enterprise AI Investment Reaches Inflection Point in 2026
cards.body: Gartner calls 2026 inflection year for aligning AI projects with business objectives. Executives increasingly demand agentic AI prove measurable financial returns.

cards.title: Anthropic AI Models Approved for Global Release
cards.body: Anthropic's models received global release approval after safety testing spurred by Trump concerns. The company expanded access to Mythos and Fable models.

cards.title: New Attack Exposes Risks of AI Browser Architecture
cards.body: Researchers identified vulnerabilities in AI-powered browser design. The finding adds to growing security concerns about AI browser assistants.

cards.title: Google's Nano Banana 2 Lite Fastest Image Model Yet
cards.body: Google released Nano Banana 2 Lite, its fastest and cheapest image generation model. The advancement improves AI image generation accessibility for creators.
